lastReleaseMessage: v0.13.2: SQLCipher key-escrow doc + round-trip test; keytar-migration backlog item; .finances history-scrub script (dry-run default); drop tracked .bak; commit 06-10 doc/dashboard batch.

barRaise.topFinding: The loop is self-correcting on content but not on cadence. Three straight runs (06-10, 06-11, 06-12) each commit the prior day's hygiene batch and then immediately re-accumulate a fresh uncommitted one, and wts-2026-06-12-yab-stale-working-tree was filed in the shared queue today. The reassuring part is that the batch is now regenerable docs, voice, and rename work, not the un-recreatable backend source that made the 06-08 era at-risk. Two prior MEDIUMs closed cleanly this cycle: the SQLCipher key-escrow doc plus round-trip test shipped, and the dashboard JSON reconciled. The one genuinely new issue is in the release script, where making -Message optional with an auto-generated body pipes a low-information stub straight into the CHANGELOG, undoing the exact stub-entry cleanup the 06-11 audit just performed.
